title: ruilopezia floccosa
intro: Ruilopezia floccosa, also known as the woolly Ruilopezia, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is native to Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ruilopezia floccosa can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
